name: spec-driven-release
description: Orchestrates production releases through spec-driven deployment workflow with structural anti-skip enforcement. Implements 8 phases covering setup, build, validation, staging, production deployment, post-deployment validation, documentation, and monitoring using the Execute-Verify-Gate pattern at every step. Designed to prevent token optimization bias through lean orchestration, fresh-context subagent delegation, and binary CLI gate enforcement. Supports multiple deployment strategies (blue-green, canary, rolling, recreate) and environments (staging, production). Use when deploying QA-approved stories. Always use this skill when the user runs /release.
